movies.Title: The Lion King
movies.Description: A spectacular photorealistic remake of Disney’s classic. Young lion Simba embarks on a journey to reclaim his rightful place as king of the jungle.
movies.Writer: Jeff Nathanson (screenplay), Brenda Chapman (story), Irene Mecchi (based on 1994 screenplay)

movies.Title: Mowgli: Legend of the Jungle
movies.Description: Torn between two worlds, Mowgli must accept his destiny and face a dangerous enemy to protect his jungle family.
movies.Writer: Callie Kloves (screenplay), Rudyard Kipling (based on the stories)

movies.Title: Doctor Strange
movies.Description: After a tragic accident, a brilliant surgeon discovers the hidden world of magic and alternate dimensions.
movies.Writer: Jon Spaihts, Scott Derrickson, C. Robert Cargill

movies.Title: John Wick
movies.Description: An ex-hitman comes out of retirement to track down the gangsters that killed his dog and took everything from him.

movies.Title: The Notebook
movies.Description: A young couple falls in love in the 1940s but are soon separated by war and social differences.
movies.Writer: Jeremy Leven (screenplay), Jan Sardi (adaptation), Nicholas Sparks (novel)
